visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long, dark hair and straight-cut bangs is positioned in the center of a medium close-up shot. She is wearing a white spaghetti strap camisole that exposes her shoulders and upper torso. She looks directly at the camera lens, speaking with a subtle, knowing smile and expressive eye movements. The background is a softly lit indoor wall, providing a clean, domestic setting with minimal clutter. Bright yellow text overlays appear sequentially at the bottom center of the frame as she delivers her lines. (2) The visual style suddenly shifts as digital CGI 'tear' filters are applied to the woman's face, showing translucent blue animated streaks flowing from her eyes. Her facial expression changes to an exaggerated, open-mouthed grimace as if she is crying loudly. More variety-style text labels and small icons appear scattered around the frame to emphasize the mock tragedy of the comedic situation, maintaining the same indoor background but with increased visual density.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Variety]: 奉勸大家. (2) [Variety]: 睡前的時候. (3) [Variety]: 千萬不要. (4) [Variety]: 滑手機. (5) [Variety]: 不然真的很嚴重. (6) [Variety]: 神經系統失調. (7) [Variety]: 靠邀. (8) [Variety]: 我現在. (9) [Variety]: 睡覺都會. (10) [Variety]: 不自覺的. (11) [Variety]: 流口水. (12) [Variety]: 就是因為我每次睡前的時候. (13) [Variety]: 一直滑手機. (14) [Variety]: 看小鮮肉. (15) [Variety]: 的影片..

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long black hair, bangs, wearing a white spaghetti strap camisole.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A plain, neutrally colored indoor wall with soft artificial lighting.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A young female voice speaks in a calm, persuasive, and slightly mysterious tone, addressing the audience with high clarity. The speech rate is standard and there is no background music, only a very low-level indoor room tone that suggests a quiet, controlled environment. (2) A sharp, percussive 'hit' sound effect occurs, signaling a narrative shift. The speaker's voice immediately transitions into a high-pitched, exaggerated sobbing and wailing performance, mimicking intense emotional distress for comedic effect. (3) The vocal performance continues with rhythmic sobbing sounds and heavy breathing to match the visual crying filter. The phase concludes with a sudden burst of high-pitched electronic laughter sound effect (meme-style) which serves as a punchline before the audio ends.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Warning -> Serious Setup -> Comedic Confession
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To entertain viewers with a humorous and relatable confession about the habit of watching attractive men (referred to as 'little fresh meat') on social media before bed, which jokingly causes the 'serious' side effect of drooling in one's sleep.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A typical social media comedy sketch using exaggerated filters and text overlays to engage a female audience with self-deprecating humor.
